attr.title: Chocolate Keen
attr.desc: Chocolate Keen is a reverse engineering of Commander Keen in C/C++ and SDL. The goal is to be as accurate to the original as possible.
attr.inst: Place your respective *.CK2 and *.CK3 files into the respective keen directories for Keen 2 and Keen 3.  Episode 1 (shareware) is included and ready to play.  You will still need to provide your purchased copies for episodes 2 and 3 and should work by copying the entire contents of those two episodes (you can use your old DOS copies and 2 & 3 are also available from Steam and GoG) into GAMEDATA/KEEN2 and GAMEDATA/KEEN3.
